common.binary

Interface BinaryOutput

  • All Superinterfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    RandomAccessWriter

    public interface BinaryOutput
extends java.lang.AutoCloseable
    Defines the core data-writing contract for binary streaming components. Satisfies the segregation pattern ensuring read-only clients cannot write.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description

      java.nio.ByteOrder getByteOrder()
